video_title: Make DIY Aesthetic Candles with Me | DIY cute candles handmade candle gift ideas | Temu molds review

windows.embed_text_v2: pouring melted wax from squeeze bottle into white silicone shell moulds, setting wick with wooden stick, red and pink wax, candle making with temu molds
windows.summary_v2: Melted wax is poured from a squeeze bottle into white silicone shell moulds, then a wick is set into a mould with a wooden stick.

tags_v2.action: pouring wax into moulds, setting wick

seconds_v2.desc: Melted wax being squeezed from a plastic bottle into the first cavity of a white silicone shell-shaped mould; a pink mould with red-wax-filled rounds sits at left.
Wax drizzles into the white silicone mould, filling a scallop-shaped cavity, hand steadying the bottle tip.
Two cavities of the white shell mould now hold pale wax; pouring continues into the next.
More cavities filled with wax, the spout moving along the top row of the silicone mould.
Wax overflows slightly between cavities as several scallop moulds are filled.
Pouring continues, filling the upper cavities of the round white silicone mould with wax.
Close-up of wax being squeezed into a tilted white silicone mould, glossy wax pooling in the cavity.
Final dribble of wax into the tilted mould cavity, wax settling and glistening.
A hand holds a round white silicone mould and uses a wooden stick to position a wick over red-tinted wax inside; more moulds and a pillar candle behind.
